description: Tastefully glitzy ethnic footwear for an earthy vibe by catwalk, for women. Wear this pair of you are tired of the over the top ethnic footwear. This versatile piece looks great with form fitting denims, a kurti and bright ethnic accessories. You can also wear this with traditional churidhars or leggings and a kurta from mother earth. Upper Heavily embellished T-strap with a rubber toe separator Suede, boat shaped footbed for optimal comfort and style Outsole TPU outsole with upraised heel and grooves for grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
